untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top requires detection of repeating oscillation between expanding highs/lows with horizontal price consolidation over months. This multi-cycle pattern with specific geometric constraints (widening amplitude, price stalling at resistance/support, new extremes) cannot be expressed through simple point-in-time indicator crossovers. The pattern's core logic—tracking multiple swing pivots and measuring expansion geometry—exceeds single-bar indicator capabilities. Breakout detection is translatable, but the pattern formation itself requires multi-bar structural analysis.
